meaning: n.(时间)短暂,(讲话,文章等)简短
examples: Brevity is the first thing we can learn from them.
Last but not the least, a speaker has to keep in mind the value of brevity.
That emphasis on brevity applies even more when you are delivering a speech.
Questions will be tweeted immediately before the answer, and might therefore be edited for brevity.
In sum, the Grimm tales contain almost no psychology a fact underlined by their brevity.
